nasb.text: “Now this shall be the priests’ due from the people, from those who offer a sacrifice, either an ox or a sheep, of which they shall give to the priest the shoulder and the two cheeks and the stomach.

esv.text: And this shall be the priests’ due from the people, from those offering a sacrifice, whether an ox or a sheep: they shall give to the priest the shoulder and the two cheeks and the stomach.

cnv.text: “祭司從人民應得的分是這樣：人無論是獻牛或是獻羊，要把前腿、兩腮和胃給祭司。

ccb.text: 众人所献的牛羊的前腿、腮颊和胃应归祭司。
